Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Attribute `clipToOutline` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 25)
Replace the <fragment> tag with FragmentContainerView.
If you plan to use data binding in a Kotlin project, you should apply the kotlin-kapt plugin.
Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
This initialization lambda (`{ 0f }`) is unnecessary and is less efficient
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Avoid using sizes smaller than `11sp`: `10sp`
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Context.withStyledAttributes` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use version catalog instead
Custom view `FastIndexView` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
